voiceover.script: Former Nurse Evan Mire to team. A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. This chapter centers on contact and contradiction arc teaser video, and your objective is to establish a defensible timeline, pressure test witness statements, and isolate deliberate manipulation. Start with intake ledger photo, map every contradiction to clock time, and keep one witness stable while you escalate.
